film.title: Chance Pe Dance
film.overview: Sameer is the archetypal struggler who leaves his dad in Delhi and comes to Mumbai, chasing dreams of becoming a star in Bollywood. Does he manage to survive the bleak and grueling rounds of endless auditions, broken promises and missed chances?

dialogues.dialogue: You'd rather hear it now or at home? I think.. home sounds better. Shameless! Didi, you should meet my dance teacher. Come with me, come on.. - What?
Wow! Alright everybody huddle up! I just want to tell you all that really proud of you. You guys have really, really improved..and I'm very happy with you all. Alright!

Unbelievable! - Any family members present here? Umm.. no, actually my dad lives in Delhi. Your dad must be very proud of you. Well, I hope so..Oh.. best of luck for the second round. - Thank you. Okay. Cut it..So which part of Delhi?
